ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "level" TEXT /* Subscription level of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address for communication */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth for age-based analytics */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for verification and support */,
  "language_preferences" TEXT /* User's preferred language for the application */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Unique referral code for the user */,
  "referral_count" INTEGER /* Number of users referred by this user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the session ended */,
  "session_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the session started */,
  "session_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "session_activity" TEXT /* Summary of user activity during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "song_title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the song in seconds */,
  "song_data" TEXT /* Binary data of the song file */,
  "album" TEXT /* Album name of the song */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the song */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the song was released */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Whether the song is explicit content */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plays" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play event */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song played */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the song was played */,
  "item_in_session" INTEGER /* Order of the song in the session */,
  "play_time" TEXT /* Time when the song was played */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the play event */,
  "play_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the play in seconds */,
  "playback_speed" REAL /* Speed at which the song was played */,
  "playback_position" REAL /* Position in the song when the play ended (for skipped songs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uses the device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., smartphone, tablet, desktop) */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version of the device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "device_brand" TEXT /* Brand of the device */,
  "device_os" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "device_screen_size" TEXT /* Screen size of the device */,
  "device_battery_level" INTEGER /* Battery level of the device at the time of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song with which the user interacted */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., like, skip, add to playlist) */,
  "interaction_time" TEXT /* Time when the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in seconds */,
  "interaction_rating" INTEGER /* User rating for the interaction (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "interaction_comment" TEXT /* User comment or feedback for the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* Subscription level after the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used (e.g., Stripe, PayPal) */,
  "next_billing_date" TEXT /* Date of the next billing cycle */,
  "subscription_expiry" TEXT /* Expiry date of the current subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the recommendation */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended song */,
  "recommendation_time" TEXT /* Time when the recommendation was made */,
  "recommendation_score" REAL /* Score indicating the strength of the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_type" TEXT /* Type of recommendation (e.g., song, playlist) */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "user_feedback" TEXT /* User feedback on the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "churn_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each churn model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the model is created */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the churn model */,
  "model_data" TEXT /* Binary data of the model */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the churn model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the churn model */,
  "model_training_data" TEXT /* Training data used for the churn model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_churn_models_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user segment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who belongs to the segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "segment_description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  "segment_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was added to the segment */,
  "segment_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used to create the segment */,
  "segment_size" INTEGER /* Number of users in the segment */,
  "segment_engagement" REAL /* Average engagement level of users in the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_segments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
